name: Alchemist
description: Failure is just another kind of success. The wrong kind.

abilities.name: Greevil's Greed
abilities.description: Synthesizes additional gold from killed enemy units. Alchemist earns base bonus gold and extra bonus gold per last hit. If Alchemist kills another unit which grants gold within a short duration, an additional instance of bonus gold is added to the total. Increases the base gold bonus and max gold bonus per granted Aghanim's Scepter to Alchemist's allied heroes.

abilities.name: Acid Spray
abilities.description: Enemy units who step across the contaminated terrain take damage per second and have their armor reduced. Continuously applies Corrosive Weaponry stacks on enemy units affected by Acid Spray.

abilities.name: Unstable Concoction
abilities.description: Applies Corrosive Weaponry stacks correspondingly to its brew time on affected enemy units upon the Unstable Concoction projectile impact.

abilities.name: Corrosive Weaponry
abilities.description: Each successful attack applies a stacking slow and base attack damage reduction. Applies Corrosive Weaponry stacks correspondingly to its brew time on affected enemy units upon the Unstable Concoction projectile impact.

abilities.name: Berserk Potion
abilities.description: Throws a potion at an allied unit, applying a basic dispel and granting them bonus attack speed, movement speed and health regeneration.

abilities.name: Chemical Rage
abilities.description: Reduces the ogre's base attack time while granting bonus movement speed and health regeneration.
